name: World of Himmapan
original_name: พิภพหิมพานต์
overview: Pim must travel to Himmapan Forest, the holy land, to find "Ulgmanee" to help her sick adoptive father But when it comes to Himmapan Forest, which is a parallel world, it is not easy. Pim had to ask for help from Krit, a young hunter who had come back from the Himmapan Forest once. So both of them have to dabble together.

trailers.title: พิภพหิมพานต์ เร็ว ๆ นี้ | Ch3Thailand
